title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at dnata India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at dnata India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
dnata India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About dnata India South Asia Partners:
dnata India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India South Asia Partners!
